description: Construct an interactive demonstration of Viviani's Theorem in GeoGebra. Create an equilateral triangle with vertices at A(0,0), B(6,0), and C(3, 5.2). Include a free, draggable point P inside the triangle and measure the perpendicular distances from P to all three sides. Add a text annotation displaying the sum of these three distances. Save the construction as 'viviani_theorem.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
